extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Michael won stage 7 after gambling on a 10km solo bridge to the remnants of a 32-rider breakaway, collecting the leaders while late attacker CORT Magnus was caught.
tactical_patterns: EF gambled WOODS bridging solo to remnant breakaway while CORT Magnus attacked, WOODS collected late chasers for stage win.
INEOS defended CARAPAZ with AMADOR working despite losing RIVERA, showing depth even with depleted roster for red jersey defense.
WELLENS Tim spent too much energy entering initial 32-rider break, finished at back on KOM losing polka dots by fifth place.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Won from solo bridge to breakaway remnants at 34 years old, two months post-leg fracture, showing elite rehab execution.
rider_signals.AMADOR Andrey: positive: Spectacular ride defending CARAPAZ red jersey with strong chase group work, key domestique showing form depth.
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: negative: Late attack from breakaway neutralized by WOODS' superior timing, celebrated teammate win not realizing his own loss.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Jumped to ninth GC from remnant break, still competitive at career twilight showing positioning instincts.
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: neutral: Present in late break moves but unable to contest sprint, held position without gaining ground.
